description: The agents infiltrate the factory in small teams to avoid detection and minimize collateral damage. Inside, they discover the Centipede soldiers are lying in wait. A battle erupts, with Mike using his powers under close medical watch. The team is nearly overwhelmed, but manages to overcome the super-soldiers. Raina and Po, monitoring remotely, use a failsafe to kill Hayward before he can reveal any Centipede secrets, shocking the agents and highlighting the enemy's ruthlessness.

transcript.line: It appears so. The only heat signatures we're reading are yours.
But there's a weird electronic signal. I'm trying to isolate it.
Place looks emptied out. Think we're too late?
Fitz, dial Hayward's number. Find out.
His systolic and diastolic pressures are dropping.
Sir, he's in bad shape. Between the physical exertion and this wound, his vitals are dangerously low.
Who's behind Centipede? Who's doing this?!
I won't say anything. I promise. No! Please! Don't do th...
That's Mike Peterson, one of our first subjects. He hasn't been injected with the serum in awhile, but he still has his powers.
No. What he has is your key to stage 3.
